history.message: Measurement planning disabled; deterministic pre-enqueue advisory recorded.

tracking_cadence_policy.does_not_change: Imaging GUI or legacy Experiment tracking_period defaults

guidance.shot_preservation_guidance: When the predicted per-average tracking window is too long, first reduce repetitions per average and compensate by increasing averages so repetitions * averages remains as close as possible to the original total shots. If that is still insufficient, split the acquisition into shorter jobs. Reduce total shots only as a last resort.
adjustment_priority: raise averages to preserve repetitions * averages whenever possible
split the acquisition into shorter jobs before reducing total shots
reduce total shots only as a last resort

warnings: Validation succeeded without touching 23-C hardware paths.
Execute remains separately gated by bootstrap and local lab validation.
Applied acquisition settings from job.metadata: averages=6, repetitions=100000, average_continuously=0.
Forced experiment tracking_period=1 for bridge-configured runs.
notes: Preview uses execute metadata opt-in only.
Static preflight does not auto-launch the legacy GUI stack.
The hidden/invisible bootstrap path is still unverified on the Win7 lab stack.
Default execute remains blocked unless the separate lab-only queue gate opens the production bridge route.

scan.Sequence:
���<sequence>

<variables>
	
sample_rate = float(250000000,1e7,5e9)
mw_freq = float(3.873000000000000e+09, 1e6, 15e9)
det=float(5e6, -10e6, 10e6);
mod_depth = float(1,0,1);    % SHG 2023.02.09 0.5685
length_pi_pulse = float(52e-9, 2e-9, 0.5)
tau = float(1e-6,0,1e-3)
switch_delay = float(1.000000000000000e-07,0,500e-9)
%delay_wrt_1mus  = float(-0.88e-6,-0.1,0.1) % 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2022-09-29-182523  %OLD 68e-9 calibrated by PL curve 11-08-05 13-17-48
delay_wrt_1mus  = float(0.2e-6,-0.1,0.1) % DLnsec LASER 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2023-10-09-183857  
wait_time   = float(2e-6, 0,1)

mw_ampl = float(-5, -20, 15)
ampIQ = float(5,-30,17) %in dBm
freqIQ = float(50e6, 0,500*1e6)


%adiabatic inversion
do_adiabatic_inversion = boolean(1)
sweep_range = float(100e6, 80e6, 500e6)
sweep_time = float(1e-6, 20e-9, 10e-6)
full_experiment = float(0, 0, 1)    % SHG 2023.02.09 1

</variables>

<shaped_pulses>

</shaped_pulses>

<instructions>
length_pi_over_2 = length_pi_pulse/2;

length_pi_over_2 = round(length_pi_over_2*sample_rate)/sample_rate; %added Sept.9 2015

ch_on =  [1 1 1 0 0];
    
PSeq = set_sample_rate(PSeq, sample_rate);

PSeq = enable_channels(PSeq, 1:5,ch_on); 

PSeq = set_microwave(PSeq, mw_freq, mw_ampl,ampIQ,freqIQ);

% Acquiring true 0 level reference 
PSeq = polarize(PSeq,sample_rate,ch_on);
PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus,ch_on);
PSeq = wait_for_awg(PSeq,sample_rate,wait_time,ch_on);

% Acquire 1 level reference 
if full_experiment
if do_adiabatic_inversion
    PSeq = adiabatic_inversion(PSeq,sample_rate,sweep_range,sweep_time,freqIQ,ch_on,mod_depth);
    PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus,ch_on);
    PSeq = wait_for_awg(PSeq,sample_rate,wait_time,ch_on);
end
end

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%Ramsey pulses
PSeq = ramsey(PSeq,sample_rate,length_pi_over_2,tau,det,switch_delay,mod_depth,ch_on);
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% Acquire Rabi and long-illumination 0 level reference
PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus,ch_on);

</instructions>

</sequence>

ScanOrderInfo.order_semantics: order_each_avg{slice}{average} contains tau indices in acquisition order

���<sequence>

<variables>
	
sample_rate = float(250000000,1e7,5e9)
mw_freq = float(3.873000000000000e+09, 1e6, 15e9)
det=float(5e6, -10e6, 10e6);
mod_depth = float(1,0,1);    % SHG 2023.02.09 0.5685
length_pi_pulse = float(52e-9, 2e-9, 0.5)
tau = float(1e-6,0,1e-3)
switch_delay = float(1.000000000000000e-07,0,500e-9)
%delay_wrt_1mus  = float(-0.88e-6,-0.1,0.1) % 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2022-09-29-182523  %OLD 68e-9 calibrated by PL curve 11-08-05 13-17-48
delay_wrt_1mus  = float(0.2e-6,-0.1,0.1) % DLnsec LASER 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2023-10-09-183857  
wait_time   = float(2e-6, 0,1)

mw_ampl = float(-5, -20, 15)
ampIQ = float(5,-30,17) %in dBm
freqIQ = float(50e6, 0,500*1e6)


%adiabatic inversion
do_adiabatic_inversion = boolean(1)
sweep_range = float(100e6, 80e6, 500e6)
sweep_time = float(1e-6, 20e-9, 10e-6)
full_experiment = float(0, 0, 1)    % SHG 2023.02.09 1

</variables>

<shaped_pulses>

</shaped_pulses>

<instructions>
length_pi_over_2 = length_pi_pulse/2;

length_pi_over_2 = round(length_pi_over_2*sample_rate)/sample_rate; %added Sept.9 2015

ch_on =  [1 1 1 0 0];
    
PSeq = set_sample_rate(PSeq, sample_rate);

PSeq = enable_channels(PSeq, 1:5,ch_on); 

PSeq = set_microwave(PSeq, mw_freq, mw_ampl,ampIQ,freqIQ);

% Acquiring true 0 level reference 
PSeq = polarize(PSeq,sample_rate,ch_on);
PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus,ch_on);
PSeq = wait_for_awg(PSeq,sample_rate,wait_time,ch_on);

% Acquire 1 level reference 
if full_experiment
if do_adiabatic_inversion
    PSeq = adiabatic_inversion(PSeq,sample_rate,sweep_range,sweep_time,freqIQ,ch_on,mod_depth);
    PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus,ch_on);
    PSeq = wait_for_awg(PSeq,sample_rate,wait_time,ch_on);
end
end

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%Ramsey pulses
PSeq = ramsey(PSeq,sample_rate,length_pi_over_2,tau,det,switch_delay,mod_depth,ch_on);
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% Acquire Rabi and long-illumination 0 level reference
PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus,ch_on);

</instructions>

</sequence>

ScanOrderInfo.order_semantics: order_each_avg{slice}{average} contains tau indices in acquisition order
order_each_avg{slice}{average} contains tau indices in acquisition order

drift_analysis.reference_method: single-average raw readout common-mode; no cross-average reference
drift_analysis.trace_aggregation_method: mean normalized raw brightness across selected readout traces
drift_analysis.drift_score_method: max(0, -linear end-minus-start of per-average common-mode raw brightness in acquisition order when scan-order metadata exists)
drift_analysis.data_order_for_score: acquisition order if ScanOrderEachAvg is available; stored tau order otherwise

metadata.intent: Run a corrected-center Ramsey/T2star repeat for image231924_c01 after narrow weak-pi pODMR shifted the usable center upward and downgraded the old 1.593 MHz peak to likely residual detuning.

stop_error_message_substrings: instrument object obj is an invalid object
